title: Welcome to my Road Bike 1984 Pinarello Steel 58cm w/ Aluminum Fork

transcript.text: So here's my road bike.
I had the shop put it together. I wish I put it together though.
I had them do it because I figured they'd do a better job of adjusting the derailleur but they didn't.
But I had to get a whole bunch of parts too and I figured it'd just be easier.
So here's my derailleur. I got a new chain.
A new headset and new stim. Those are actually the only parts that I got.
It's an 84 Pinarello. It's got a steel bike.
I have this big metal thing over the end of this because the frame broke.
And so the seat post can only go in that far.
So I had to cut it the right size. I think it's the right length. It may be a little bit long.
We'll go on a ride and see.
My other carbon fiber wheel broke.
It fell off on my rack. I thought I had it tightened but it wasn't.
So when I get the money I'll put that in the back and then I'll just get a new front wheel to put up there.
But until then that's it.
It's got the ship levers. It's a 58 centimeter so it's too big for me.
But that's the height of the seat so it's not too big by much.
I mean this is only the second bike, I mean third bike my whole life I've had.
Third road bike. I had a Pook an 84, a Schwinn an 85, 86, 87 and then I got this.
But hopefully this thing won't break.
I'll do a video in a second showing all my gear.
I forgot to show.
This thing is down. This stem is a little bit shorter than the last stem I had.
So it feels a little bit scrunched but I'll probably get used to it.
It's on its lowest but it's cool that I know I can bring it up though.
In case I do like a big huge ride I can bring it up for that.
If I feel like I need to.
So that's that.
Oh and the gears I think that's 53 in the front.
And like a 12 in the back or something.
So that's good enough.
Alright.
Oh and the gears in the back I think that's a 29 so that's good enough for climbing.
Like a really long ride where I bring a lot of shit and I'm tired and it's steep.
I think I'll be okay.
Alright.
